legalNote: Este documento se proporciona en varios idiomas para tu comodidad. En caso de conflicto o discrepancia entre versiones lingüísticas, prevalecerá la versión en inglés.

deleteAccount.title: Eliminar cuenta
deleteAccount.description: Para solicitar la eliminación de tu cuenta y de todos los datos asociados, completa el formulario a continuación. Esto abrirá tu cliente de correo con un mensaje predefinido para nuestro equipo de soporte.
deleteAccount.confirmCodeNote: Puedes obtener tu código de confirmación en los ajustes de la aplicación.
deleteAccount.errorEmpty: Por favor, completa todos los campos.
deleteAccount.info: Tu solicitud se procesará en un plazo de 30 días. Recibirás un correo de confirmación cuando tu cuenta haya sido eliminada.
deleteAccount.emailBodyMessage: Solicito la eliminación de mi cuenta y de todos los datos asociados.

support.title: Soporte
support.intro: Estamos aquí para ayudarte. Elige un tema abajo y abriremos un correo con el asunto predefinido para responderte más rápido.

topics.accountDescription: Problemas de acceso, nombre de usuario, cambios de perfil
topics.accountSubject: Soporte — Cuenta e inicio de sesión
topics.feedbackDescription: Solicitudes de funciones y comentarios generales

support.responseNote: Solemos responder en un plazo de 2 días laborables. Para solicitudes de eliminación de cuenta, utiliza nuestro

hero.subtitle: ScoreHunter is the skill-based football prediction game. Pick the matches, call the scores, and climb the global leaderboards — week after week.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to start hunting
howItWorks.subtitle: No betting. No coupons. Just your football brain against everyone else's.

steps.title: Pick the matches
steps.description: We line up the week's biggest fixtures from the leagues you care about.

steps.title: Call the scores
steps.description: Predict the outcome, the exact score, and who finds the net. Lock it in before kickoff.

steps.title: Climb the board
steps.description: Live points roll in as the matches play. Win trophies, top weekly tables, repeat.

rules.title: Skill-based, by design
rules.howIntro: ScoreHunter rewards football knowledge, not luck. Every match is worth the same, every player has the same shot.
howItems: Each week, a curated set of fixtures unlocks for predictions.
Pick the result (1, X, 2), the exact score, and goal scorers.
Mini games drop between match days for quick prediction rounds.
All matches are equal value — no odds, no multipliers, no payouts.
Pro members get extra perks but never an unfair advantage.
scoringItems: Bonus picks across weekly mini games
rewardsItems: Top spots on weekly and seasonal leaderboards
Promotional prizes from time to time — jerseys, footballs, digital gift cards (no cash, no gambling)
Pro membership perks like reduced ads and exclusive trophies

features.title: Everything you need to predict, compete, and win
features.subtitle: Built for football fans who want their knowledge to count.

items.title: Score Hunt
items.description: The core weekly mode. Predict the biggest fixtures and ride the live points as they happen.

items.title: Mini games
items.description: Quick prediction rounds between match days. Different rules, same skill, instant fun.

items.title: Leagues
items.description: Public boards for the world or private leagues just for you and your friends.

items.title: Trophies
items.description: Hundreds of weekly, seasonal, and lifetime achievements to chase.

items.title: Pro Membership
items.description: A smoother experience with fewer ads and Pro-only trophies. Optional, never required.

items.title: Live tracking
items.description: Watch your score climb minute by minute as the matches unfold.

screenshots.title: Designed to be played, not studied
screenshots.subtitle: Quick to pick up, deep to master.

items.a: Yes — fully free to download and play. There's an optional Pro membership for extras like reduced ads, but the core game is free for everyone.
No. ScoreHunter has no betting, no odds, no money in or out. All matches are equal value and prizes are promotional only — never cash.
Yes. Sign in with Apple or Google in seconds — no passwords, no email verification.
Of course. Create a private league, share the invite link, and let the bragging rights begin.
iPhone (iOS 14+) and Android (Android 8+). One account works across both.

finalCta.title: Hunt the score this weekend
finalCta.subtitle: Download ScoreHunter, link your account in seconds, and lock in your first predictions before kickoff.
finalCta.freeBadge: 100% free · No credit card · Apple & Google sign-in
